config.frost_lava_walker.title: Frost Lava Walker – Config
Show particles for block conversion. Disable if you experience lag.
config.frost_lava_walker.play_sound.tool: Play sound effects for block conversion. Disable if you experience lag.
config.frost_lava_walker.lava_walker_ena: Toggle Lava Walker. Disable to remove the mechanic entirely.
config.frost_lava_walker.base_radius.too: Lava Walker Radius in blocks. Enchantment level is added on top. Set to 0 so only Frost Walker II allows Lava Walk.
config.frost_lava_walker.gilded_initial_: Duration of the initial Gilded Blackstone Flash.
config.frost_lava_walker.blackstone_main: Duration of the main safe Blackstone Phase. Longest by default.
config.frost_lava_walker.gilded_warning_: Duration of the first Warning Phase (Gilded Blackstone again).
config.frost_lava_walker.magma_short_tic: Duration of the Magma Block Phase.
config.frost_lava_walker.cooldown_extra_: Extra Ticks during which Lava cannot be reconverted. Set to 0 to disable.
